import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_gcd_basic():
    """Test GCD with a simple case: gcd(35, 21) should return 7.

    The buggy code passes (a % b, b) instead of (b, a % b) to the recursive call,
    causing infinite recursion when a % b < b.
    """
    result = source.gcd(35, 21)
    assert result == 7
